title: Layoff Event
description: Schema for company layoff and workforce reduction event records.

company_name.description: Name of the company conducting the layoff. Commonly found in: press release headline, news article title, layoff tracker entry.

company_domain.description: Website domain of the company. Commonly found in: company website link, press release footer, company profile.

company_industry.description: Industry sector of the company. Commonly found in: company profile, news article classification, layoff tracker category.

headcount_affected.description: Number of employees affected by the layoff. Commonly found in: press release body, news article headline, layoff tracker count.

headcount_affected_pct.description: Percentage of total workforce affected. Commonly found in: press release body, news article body, workforce reduction percentage.

affected_departments.description: Departments or teams affected by the layoff. Commonly found in: press release body, news article details, layoff announcement.

affected_locations.description: Office locations affected by the layoff. Commonly found in: press release body, news article details, WARN notice.

announcement_date.description: Date the layoff was publicly announced. Commonly found in: press release date, article publish date, announcement timestamp.

effective_date.description: Date the layoffs took or take effect. Commonly found in: press release body, WARN notice effective date, announcement details.

layoff_type.description: Stated reason or type of layoff. Commonly found in: press release body, news article analysis, company statement.

severance_weeks.description: Number of weeks of severance pay offered. Commonly found in: press release body, employee communication, news article details.

rehire_eligible.description: Whether laid-off employees are eligible for rehire. Commonly found in: press release body, employee FAQ, company statement.

source_url.description: URL of the page from which this data was extracted. Commonly found in: browser URL bar, canonical link tag, og:url meta tag.

source_type.description: Type of source for the layoff information. Commonly found in: site domain classification, content type, source format.

ceo_statement.description: Statement or message from the CEO about the layoff. Commonly found in: press release CEO quote, internal memo published externally, news article quote.

extracted_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this record was extracted. Commonly found in: extraction metadata, scraper system timestamp.
